libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For nativeTest/native-image runtime execution of io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 on JDK 25, set runtime system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer bound to localhost; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The public OAuth2WebClient API references optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; only add that dependency if the generated tests intentionally exercise OAuth2-specific APIs.
If the runtime properties remain version-gated only for 5.0.0, 5.0.1 native-image runs can continue failing despite otherwise valid coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful WebClient coverage, but native runs on JDK 25 need the same Netty unsafe-access runtime properties already used for Vert.x 5.0.0 because 5.0.1 still pulls Netty 4.2.x.
